item.title: The Unbelievable Effect of Blue Eyeshadow on Hooded Eyes!
item.description: I’m demonstrating the striking effect of navy tones on hooded lids. Learn how I use color contrast to draw attention away from the fold and make any eye color appear more vibrant and awake.

media:content.media:title: The Unbelievable Effect of Blue Eyeshadow on Hooded Eyes!
media:content.media:description: I’m demonstrating the striking effect of navy tones on hooded lids. Learn how I use color contrast to draw attention away from the fold and make any eye color appear more vibrant and awake.

item.title: Become a Makeup Pro With These Easy Hacks ❤️
item.description: You don’t need to be a professional to look like one. I’m breaking down my favorite simplified techniques to help you achieve a high-end, polished result in less time.

media:content.media:title: Become a Makeup Pro With These Easy Hacks ❤️
media:content.media:description: You don’t need to be a professional to look like one. I’m breaking down my favorite simplified techniques to help you achieve a high-end, polished result in less time.

item.title: Eyebrow Mapping: The EASIEST way to perfect your brows!
item.description: Stop guessing where your brows should start and end. I’m breaking down the geometry of brow mapping so you can achieve a professional, salon-quality finish at home every time.

media:content.media:title: Eyebrow Mapping: The EASIEST way to perfect your brows!
media:content.media:description: Stop guessing where your brows should start and end. I’m breaking down the geometry of brow mapping so you can achieve a professional, salon-quality finish at home every time.

item.title: This Hooded Eye Look Only Requires 2 Pencils! ❤️
item.description: I believe beautiful makeup doesn't have to be complicated. I’m showing you how to define and lift hooded eyes using just two versatile pencils for a sophisticated, everyday finish.

media:content.media:title: This Hooded Eye Look Only Requires 2 Pencils! ❤️
media:content.media:description: I believe beautiful makeup doesn't have to be complicated. I’m showing you how to define and lift hooded eyes using just two versatile pencils for a sophisticated, everyday finish.

item.title: How I Cover Dark Circles Without Concealer - 5 Ways
item.description: If your concealer always cakes or creases, I have a solution. I’m sharing five effective ways to use lightweight products like tinted primers and eye pencils to achieve a smooth, rested look.

media:content.media:title: How I Cover Dark Circles Without Concealer - 5 Ways
media:content.media:description: If your concealer always cakes or creases, I have a solution. I’m sharing five effective ways to use lightweight products like tinted primers and eye pencils to achieve a smooth, rested look.

item.title: THIS is my best cut crease technique for hooded eyes!
item.description: I’m showing you exactly where to map your crease to ensure it doesn't disappear when you open your eyes. This is my most reliable method for creating depth and definition on hooded lids.

media:content.media:title: THIS is my best cut crease technique for hooded eyes!
media:content.media:description: I’m showing you exactly where to map your crease to ensure it doesn't disappear when you open your eyes. This is my most reliable method for creating depth and definition on hooded lids.

item.title: This is the EASIEST eyeliner technique ever!
item.description: I’m breaking down the simplest way to define your eyes without the stress. If you struggle with steady lines, this guided method ensures a polished look in seconds.

media:content.media:title: This is the EASIEST eyeliner technique ever!
media:content.media:description: I’m breaking down the simplest way to define your eyes without the stress. If you struggle with steady lines, this guided method ensures a polished look in seconds.

item.title: How To: Big Wing On Hooded Eyes!
item.description: Stop your eyeliner from disappearing. I am sharing my step-by-step technique to create a bold, visible wing that stays sharp and perfectly defined on hooded lids.

media:content.media:title: How To: Big Wing On Hooded Eyes!
media:content.media:description: Stop your eyeliner from disappearing. I am sharing my step-by-step technique to create a bold, visible wing that stays sharp and perfectly defined on hooded lids.
